title: Bream in the form of a sword/Лещь виде меча
description: This resource pack replaces the model of all swords in Minecraft, but unfortunately it cannot be used with other resource packs to change models of only swords.
body: A resource pack for minecraft, if you want to hit a friend or someone with a bream, then you can do it since I made it a resource pack, so give it a hard bream
